title: He And She
content:
When I am dead you'll find it hard,
        Said he,
    To ever find another man
        Like me.

    What makes you think, as I suppose

title: Siege Of Djklxprwbz, The
content:
Before a Turkish town
        The Russians came.
    And with huge cannon
        Did bombard the same.

        And ra
